summary: build-brand-snapshot.py offer counter reads offer_groups[].offers[] (v2 schema) instead of legacy flat offers[].
notes: Silent bug fix. Detected during v2.6.10 live onboarding (an e-commerce pilot run). Snapshot previously showed 'offers active: 0' regardless of populated offers.json, now reports the real count.

changes.note: Offers block: replaced `offers_doc.get('offers', [])` iteration with iteration over `offer_groups[].offers[]`. Backward-compatible.
